-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

GIVE YOURSELF THE GIFT OF DISCOVERY

12 WEEKS FOR JUST 99 CENTS!

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/1489887fflayfousuan2kekiaaaaaazy52vsqsmzmnmyaaaaa

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear Times Reader,
 
The New York Times is dedicated to satisfying curious minds 
-- like yours. Now, for the holiday season, we invite you to 
reward yourself, and your curiosity, with a Times Digital 
Subscription for just 99 cents for 12 weeks.

Get more fully informed, more inspired, more challenged with 
unlimited access to nytimes.com and our apps for smartphones or 
tablets or both.

Have the world's finest journalism at your fingertips 
anytime, anywhere. Act now to take advantage of this special, 
limited-time offer: just 99 cents for 12 weeks.

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS SPECIAL, LIMITED-TIME OFFER

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/1b6d5dd42layfousuan2kekqaaaaaazy52vsqsmzmnmyaaaaa

*****

12 WEEKS FOR 99 CENTS

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://email.newyorktimes.com/155c1e916layfousuan2kekyaaaaaazy52vsqsmzmnmyaaaaa

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this e-mail because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

*Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York 
Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader 
editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords 
apps. Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. You will be 
billed 99 cents for the first 12 weeks up front which is 
nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will 
automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will 
be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless 
canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and 
termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. 
Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other 
restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please 
add nytimes@email.newyorktimes.com to your address book.

body_html:
Dear Times Reader,

The New York Times is dedicated to satisfying curious minds — like yours. Now, for the holiday season, we invite you to reward yourself, and your curiosity, with a Times Digital Subscription for just 99¢ for 12 weeks.

Get more fully informed, more inspired, more challenged with unlimited access to nytimes.com and our apps for smartphones or tablets or both.

Have the world’s finest journalism at your fingertips anytime, anywhere. Act now to take advantage of this special, limited-time offer: just 99¢ for 12 weeks.  

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS SPECIAL, LIMITED-TIME OFFER.
You received this e-mail because you are a registered user of The New York Times.

*Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York Times digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. You will be billed 99 cents for the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and your credit card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each four-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please add nytimes@email.newyorktimes.com to your address book.
